name: cardiac_nextlab_benchmark_v1
description: Next-lab-value prediction benchmark for cardiac patients from EHRSHOT. Given a patient's complete lab timeline up to an initial elevated Troponin I, predict the value of the next serial Troponin I measurement.

diagnoses: Coronary artery disease, native coronary artery

question.stem:
Patient subject_id: 115967110

A 60-year-old Male presents with chest symptoms. Current diagnoses: Essential (primary) hypertension; I21.4; Coronary artery disease, native coronary artery; I71.2; R07.9; R79.89; E78.5; I25.82. Current medications: not recorded.

The lab timeline below shows all available measurements up to 2019-07-28 16:32 (3 prior Troponin I value(s) visible in context).

The next Troponin I measurement is scheduled for 2019-07-28 20:01 (3.5 hours after the most recent measurement).

Based on this patient's lab history and clinical context, predict the Troponin I value at 2019-07-28 20:01.

scoring_guide.note: Score = direction_correct (0.4 if direction matches, else 0) + within_50pct (0.35 if |error| ≤ 50%, else 0) + within_20pct (0.25 if |error| ≤ 20%, else 0). Max = 1.0.
